name: Veg Spring Rolls
description: Veg Spring Rolls crispy vegetable rolls stuffed with cabbage, carrots and fresh vegetables. Popular Indo-Chinese starter served with sweet chili sauce. Crunchy snack, vegetarian appetizer, party starter, light meal, street food and restaurant favorite.

name: Chicken Tikka
description: Chicken Tikka grilled chicken appetizer marinated with yogurt and Indian spices. Smoky tandoori flavour, high protein non vegetarian starter. Popular Indian BBQ dish, restaurant favourite, spicy chicken snack.

name: Hara Bhara Kebab
description: Hara Bhara Kebab vegetarian kebab made with spinach, peas and potatoes. Healthy Indian starter rich in vegetables. Crispy snack, vegetarian appetizer, green kebab, restaurant starter.

name: Paneer Butter Masala
description: Paneer Butter Masala creamy paneer curry with tomato butter gravy. Popular North Indian vegetarian main course. Paneer dish, rich curry, restaurant favourite, served with naan and roti.

name: Dal Tadka
description: Experience the comforting warmth of Dal Tadka, a classic Indian yellow lentil dish simmered to perfection and tempered with aromatic spices like cumin, garlic, and red chilies. A soulful and flavorful preparation, ideal for a hearty meal.

name: Butter Chicken
description: Butter Chicken creamy chicken curry with butter and tomato gravy. Popular North Indian non-vegetarian main course. Rich flavourful curry, restaurant favourite, served with naan and rice.

name: Veg Biryani
description: Veg Biryani aromatic rice dish with vegetables and Indian spices. Popular vegetarian main course, flavorful rice meal. Hyderabadi style biryani, lunch and dinner favorite.

name: Vegan Buddha Bowl
description: Vegan Buddha Bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, avocado and fresh vegetables. Healthy vegan, gluten-free and dairy-free meal rich in plant protein and fiber. Perfect for lunch, healthy eating and fitness-focused diets.

name: Garlic Naan
description: Savor this soft, chewy leavened flatbread, infused with aromatic garlic and baked to perfection in a tandoor. It's the ideal accompaniment to any curry or main course.

name: Butter Roti
description: A delicious Butter Roti prepared with authentic Indian flavors and fresh ingredients.

name: Masala Dosa
description: Masala Dosa crispy South Indian dosa with potato masala filling. Popular breakfast dish served with chutney and sambar. Vegetarian meal, healthy snack, South Indian cuisine.

name: Samosa
description: Samosa crispy fried pastry filled with potatoes and peas. Popular Indian street food and evening snack. Vegetarian appetizer, tea-time snack, crunchy savoury food.

name: Poha
description: Poha flattened rice breakfast dish with onions, peanuts and spices. Healthy Indian breakfast, light meal, vegetarian food. Popular morning snack, nutritious and easy to digest.

name: Chocolate Brownie
description: Chocolate Brownie rich fudgy chocolate dessert with soft center. Popular bakery sweet, dessert for chocolate lovers. Served with ice cream, snack and sweet treat.

name: Gulab Jamun
description: Gulab Jamun traditional Indian dessert made from milk solids and sugar syrup. Soft sweet dumplings, festive sweet dish. Popular Indian dessert, celebration food, restaurant favourite.

name: Cold Coffee
description: Cold Coffee chilled coffee beverage blended with milk and ice. Refreshing cafe-style drink with rich coffee flavour. Popular summer drink, coffee lover favourite, creamy cold beverage.

name: Fresh Orange Juice
description: Fresh Orange Juice natural citrus beverage made from fresh oranges. Healthy drink rich in vitamin C and antioxidants. Refreshing breakfast juice, fruit beverage, healthy lifestyle drink.

name: Mango Smoothie
description: A lusciously smooth and creamy blend of ripe, sweet mangoes. Perfectly chilled for a tropical escape in every sip.

name: Dragon Paneer
description: Savor perfectly crisp paneer cubes tossed in a fiery, vibrant Indo-Chinese 'Dragon' sauce, brimming with bell peppers and onions. This intensely flavored appetizer offers a bold and spicy kick, perfect for starting your meal.

name: Chilli Mushroom
description: Chilli Mushroom spicy mushroom starter with onions, capsicum and Indo Chinese sauces. Vegetarian appetizer, spicy snack, mushroom lovers choice.

name: Peri Peri Fries
description: Peri Peri Fries crispy potato fries with spicy peri peri seasoning. Snack food, spicy appetizer, restaurant side dish, fast food favorite.

name: Quinoa Veg Salad
description: Quinoa Veg Salad healthy vegan meal with quinoa, vegetables and lemon dressing. Dairy free gluten free salad, nutritious lunch, plant based food

name: Thai Green Curry
description: A delicious Thai Green Curry prepared with authentic Indian flavors and fresh ingredients.

name: Chicken 65
description: Chicken 65 spicy South Indian chicken starter. Crispy fried chicken appetizer, non vegetarian snack, restaurant favorite.

name: Chilli Chicken
description: Chilli Chicken spicy Indo Chinese chicken appetizer with onions and peppers. Non vegetarian starter, restaurant favorite, spicy chicken dish.

name: Veg Kolhapuri
description: Kolhapuri Veg Curry spicy Maharashtrian vegetable curry. Vegetarian main course, traditional Indian food, hot and flavourful curry.

name: Schezwan Noodles
description: Schezwan Noodles spicy Indo Chinese noodles with vegetables and Schezwan sauce. Hot meal, restaurant favourite, spicy noodle dish.
